trivia_bullets.text: Galvanize is a red instant from Murders at Karlov Manor (MKM), released 2024-02-09 on Ravnica — a murder-mystery set featuring the Ravnican Agency of Magicological Investigations (R.A.M.I.) solving a string of homicides [Scryfall].

Flavor text: "Why doesn't Kylox put an off switch on these things?!" — Speaker unnamed, referencing Kylox, the Izzet viashino artificer who invented the projektors used by R.A.M.I. detectives and who was one of MKM's murder victims [Scryfall, WebSearch snippet: draftsim.com].

The spell deals 3 damage normally but 5 damage if two or more cards have been drawn this turn — a draw-payoff clause that rewards the set's Investigate/Clue-token card-draw engine in the same turn [Scryfall oracle text]. EDHREC rank 16898, indicating limited Constructed uptake outside the MKM draft environment [Scryfall].

The lizard-like figure in the art aligns with the viashino species prominent in Izzet guild lore — Kylox himself is described as a red-scaled viashino — though no oracle text or flavor text identifies the depicted figure as a named character [WebSearch snippet: draftsim.com].

related_cards.name: Kylox, Visionary Inventor
related_cards.note: Named character referenced in flavor text; Izzet artificer and MKM murder victim

related_cards.name: Torch the Witness
related_cards.note: Another red damage spell in MKM with Investigate payoff and witness-elimination theme
